verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Hear the blessed Savior calling the oppressed, "Oh ye heavy-laden, come to Me and rest; Come, no longer tarry, I your load will bear, Bring Me ev'ry burden, bring Me ev'ry care."

verse.name: v2
v3
verse.lines: Are you disappointed, wand'ring here and there, Dragging chains of doubt and loaded down with care? Do unholy feelings struggle in your breast? Bring your case to Jesus, He will give you rest.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Stumbling on the mountains dark with sin and shame, Stumbling tow'rd the pit of hell's consuming flame, By the pow'rs of sin deluded and oppressed, Hear the tender Shepherd, "Come to Me and rest."

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Have you by temptation often conquered been, Has a sense of weakness brought distress within? Christ will sanctify you, if you'll claim His best, In the Holy Spirit, He will give you rest.
